task_completion.description: Agent opens the citation style manager or preferences window in the reference manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Preferences', 'Settings', or 'Style Manager' window is open in the reference manager (e.g., Zotero), showing the 'Cite' or 'Styles' tab.

task_completion.description: The custom 'Journal of Applied AI' style is successfully installed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The style 'Journal of Applied AI' is visible in the list of installed citation styles within the reference manager's style manager.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the three specified machine learning papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The papers 'Deep Learning' (LeCun), 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani), and 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow) are simultaneously highlighted/selected in the reference manager's main library view.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the dialog to create a bibliography from the selected items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Bibliography from Items' or similar export dialog box is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the custom style for the bibliography export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the export dialog, 'Journal of Applied AI' is highlighted or selected as the active citation style.

task_completion.description: Agent selects RTF as the output format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the export dialog, the output method or format is explicitly set to 'RTF' (Rich Text Format).

task_completion.description: The final bibliography is saved correctly and contains the unique style markers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'bibliography.rtf' in '/home/ga/Documents/', OR the final RTF file is open in an editor showing the three citations, each ending with the unique marker '[JAA]'.

integrity.description: Agent used the reference manager's graphical interface to install the style and export the bibliography.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the reference manager's GUI (menus, dialogs, buttons) rather than using terminal commands or Python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The bibliography was genuinely generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file is created via the reference manager's export functionality, not by the agent manually typing or copy-pasting the expected text into a document.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a dedicated reference management application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main window and dialogs belong to a reference manager (like Zotero), not just a generic file browser or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom citation style is named 'Journal of Applied AI' and it appends a unique marker '[JAA]' to the end of every citation. The three required papers are 'Deep Learning' (LeCun et al., 2015), 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017), and 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014). The final output must be an RTF file saved at '/home/ga/Documents/bibliography.rtf'.
